changes: Removed data-at-beginning and data-at-end attributes from .swiper-parent div
Removed grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1 classes from .swiper-parent div (kept overflow-hidden)
Unwrapped .swiper-slides-wrapper div -- .swiper div now sits directly inside .swiper-parent
Removed fade mask comment and both fade mask divs (.testimonials-fade-left, .testimonials-fade-right)
Adjusted indentation of unwrapped children (reduced by one level)
Removed 'grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1' from FilteredServerSideRender className (kept 'swiper-parent overflow-hidden relative')
Removed 'on' property from Swiper config (init, slideChange, reachBeginning, reachEnd handlers)
Removed MutationObserver block that watched data-at-beginning/data-at-end attributes and toggled fade mask opacity

warnings: Asset size warnings for editor.js, screen bundle, and css/screen (pre-existing)

syncStatus.notes: PHP and TSX are in sync -- both use 'swiper-parent overflow-hidden' without grid classes or data attributes

fixesApplied.description: Removed .swiper-slides-wrapper div entirely, promoting .swiper div directly under .swiper-parent
Removed grid classes from .swiper-parent in both PHP and TSX
Removed all data-at-beginning/data-at-end attributes, Swiper event handlers, updateFadeMasks function, and MutationObserver from JS
